_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: Expression of GRDC24 via AAV inhibited pERK1/2 and significantly reduced viable cell numbers in NF1−/− NC cells, while FiPS-derived NC cells were less affected, especially at lower MOIs
details: FiPS-derived neural crest cells were less affected by GRDC24 expression compared to NF1-/- cells, especially at lower MOIs
